MongoDB._comment: ConnectionString and DatabaseName are expected to come from environment variables in staging. Override via MongoDB__ConnectionString and MongoDB__DatabaseName at deploy time.

Auth._comment: Production-style auth: dev stub MUST be off. ClientId is required and is also the audience for ID-token validation. The Authority defaults to https://accounts.google.com via AuthenticationExtensions when omitted.

Cors._comment: Comma-separated list of allowed origins for the staging frontend. Set via Cors__AllowedOrigins at deploy time.

AuditLog._comment: Local-file sink is unsuitable for any non-dev environment because containers are ephemeral. Replace with a managed sink (Azure Monitor, Splunk, S3 + Object Lock, ...) before going live. Until that is wired, FileAuditLog will write to /var/audit-trail inside the container - data is lost on restart.

_telemetry._comment: Application Insights is opt-in via the APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING environment variable. When set, the Azure Monitor OpenTelemetry distro registers and auto-instruments ASP.NET Core requests, HttpClient calls, and exceptions. Create an Application Insights resource in the Azure portal and paste its Connection String into App Service Configuration. When the env var is unset, OpenTelemetry is not registered and the app runs with zero telemetry overhead.
